category_sources: Official GitHub README describes DigiTemp as a 1-wire temperature sensor command-line interface.
source_facts.description says it reads temperature sensors in a 1-Wire net.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides setup and project information.
Official repository includes the digitemp.1 manpage as command documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/bcl/digitemp, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes DigiTemp setup and 1-wire temperature sensor usage.
source_facts.description mentions temperature sensors and 1-Wire net.
